blocks.content: Davenport called back nine minutes later.

blocks.speaker: Julian
blocks.content: Someone accessed that window. I don't know how yet — the drop is twenty feet and there's nothing obvious to climb. But the bracket tells me they were there. The scrape is recent.

blocks.speaker: Davenport
blocks.content: Twenty feet is twenty feet, Mr. Crane. Nobody goes in or out of a window twenty feet up without—

blocks.speaker: Julian
blocks.content: Without what. Without leaving evidence on the bracket? They left evidence on the bracket.

blocks.speaker: Julian
blocks.content: I'm not telling you I know how they did it. I'm telling you they did it. The how comes later. What matters right now is the bracket says the window was used, the door was locked from the inside, and those two things together mean this room isn't as sealed as everyone thinks.

blocks.speaker: Davenport
blocks.content: If someone came in through the window — they couldn't have gone back out the same way. Not from inside.

blocks.speaker: Julian
blocks.content: No. They went out the door.

blocks.speaker: Davenport
blocks.content: Which was locked from the inside.

blocks.speaker: Davenport
blocks.content: So they locked it — from the outside — after leaving.

blocks.speaker: Julian
blocks.content: Now you're asking the right question.

blocks.speaker: Davenport
blocks.content: Get forensics on that bracket tonight. I'll be in touch.

blocks.speaker: Julian
blocks.content: Don't let the group see them working the exterior.
He ended the call. Looked at what he'd written.
Window used. How — unknown. Twenty feet. Figure it out.
He underlined the last three words.
